ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
$Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended"&& $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps"&& $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator"&& RecordType.Name ="Partnership"&&
(ISCHANGED(StageName) && ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Proposal")) && ISBLANK( Target_ARR__c ) && NOT(ISCHANGED( Owner_s_Manager__c ))&& NOT(ISNEW())&& NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c))&& NOT (Account_owner_changed__c) = FALSE && NOT(ISCHANGED(Opportunity_Division__c))&& NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Division__c,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Mandatory field at Proposal stage: Target ARR
